result: Researched open-source prompt management tools (Langfuse, Pezzo, PromptLayer, Humanloop) and hosting requirements for LiteLLM, Bifrost, and Portkey OSS. Key finding: Langfuse + LiteLLM achieves Portkey-level prompt management with self-hosting. LiteLLM requires 4 vCPU/8GB RAM for production, Bifrost needs only 2 vCPU/2GB. Both can colocate on existing EC2. None run on Vercel serverless.
